note: LIVE-data manifest for the lean-6module-v1.1 freshness gate. Run executed 2026-06-23 (run_date); as_of pins to the LAST FULLY-SETTLED NYSE close = 2026-06-22 = $280.36 (today 2026-06-23 was still an active, unsettled trading session ~$275.1 intraday at run time, so the last settled close is the correct 'latest trading day's close' per the brief). Every LIVE field carries >=2 independent sources fetched at run time; verify_freshness.py re-fetches Yahoo (last close <= as_of => 280.36) independently and cross-checks these declared sources + the decision_card value. FILED data (10-Q/10-K line items, Q1 2026 reported 2026-05-07) is NOT here -- it rides the dated-source claim_ledger discipline.

live_fields.note: Last settled close 2026-06-22 = $280.36 (-3.5% off 52wk high $290.63; +65% off 52wk low $169.45). Not hugging either extreme -> no high/low-grab error. Today 2026-06-23 intraday ~$275.1 (-2% on the day) but session not settled at run time; as_of correctly pins to the prior settled close.

Derived 400.31M shares x $280.36 = $112.23B. stockanalysis reports $110.11B at its $275.20 intraday 06-23 print (lower price); at the 06-22 settled close of $280.36 the cap is ~$112.2B. Delta vs stockanalysis driven by the price-date difference (06-22 settled vs 06-23 intraday), not a share-count discrepancy.

10-Q cover count 400,713,557 as of 2026-03-24 (~400.71M); stockanalysis current shares 400.11M; Q1 release '401M shares at period end'. Use ~400.31M for the mcap identity (price x shares). Cross-source spread <0.2%.

live_fields.value: FY2026 guidance RAISED at Q1 2026 print (2026-05-07): Revenue $9,575-9,725M (baseline $9,650M, +$550M vs prior); Adjusted EBITDA $3,025-3,095M (baseline $3,060M, +$300M, +140bps margin); Adjusted EPS $4.88-5.00 (baseline $4.94, +$0.49); Free Cash Flow $1,700-1,800M (baseline $1,750M, +$150M). Q1 2026 actuals beat the high end on revenue, adj EBITDA, margin, and adj EPS. Next earnings ~late-July/early-Aug 2026 (Q2 2026).

No material new litigation or regulatory action identified as of as_of. Standard legacy environmental/asbestos reserves (Arconic/Alcoa heritage) continue but are immaterial to thesis. Fitch upgraded HWM to A- (2026-02-13) from BBB+; all 3 major agencies rate >=3 notches into investment grade -- a credit-quality signal, not a liability. CEO flagged a possible spares demand effect from 'the Iranian conflict' (2026 geopolitical) as a watch item, not a disclosed loss.
